item.title: A Family Vanished Then A Shocking Discovery Changed Everything
item.description: In February 2010, Joseph and Summer McStay and their two young sons disappeared from their California home without explanation. For years, investigators searched for answers until a major breakthrough transformed the case. The investigation ultimately led to a high profile trial, a conviction, and continuing debate about the evidence presented in court.

media:content.media:title: A Family Vanished Then A Shocking Discovery Changed Everything
media:content.media:description: In February 2010, Joseph and Summer McStay and their two young sons disappeared from their California home without explanation. For years, investigators searched for answers until a major breakthrough transformed the case. The investigation ultimately led to a high profile trial, a conviction, and continuing debate about the evidence presented in court.

item.title: A College Student's Violent Breakdown Left Many Questions
item.description: Austin Harrouff was a Florida college student whose actions during a shocking 2016 crime stunned the nation. The case sparked intense debate about mental health, substance use, and what may have triggered one of the most disturbing incidents in recent memory.

media:content.media:title: A College Student's Violent Breakdown Left Many Questions
media:content.media:description: Austin Harrouff was a Florida college student whose actions during a shocking 2016 crime stunned the nation. The case sparked intense debate about mental health, substance use, and what may have triggered one of the most disturbing incidents in recent memory.
